title: The Unrewarding Ore Dweller Mod
description: A mod that adds an unrewarding ore dweller, that'll leap up at you.
body:
A mod that adds an unrewarding ore dweller, that'll leap up at you. you can find them in the caves of the overworld and so far there is only "infested coal", but soon there will be "infested iron" "infested gold" and "infested emeralds". So, yes. its an annoying mod but scary mod, just for your horror modpacks! Also this mod requires Geckolib. So if you dont have that, please download it for it to work!

Any other information will be on my page, where you can join my Discord server! So if you need ANY help. I am happy to listen:)
